data.body: Per user direction (design B1+B2 seam before implementing), wrote docs/design/batch-runner-seam.md (committed on feat/production-batch-runner, e7f25f6c). Key decisions for review: D1 keep BatchRunRequest generic + runner reconstructs PlanContext from target_ticket (replay-safe: runner not re-run on replay); D2 EXTRACT orchestrator._run_passes (the Pass-1 loop) + the PlanContext builder into a shared function that BOTH orchestrator and the runner call (satisfies AC3 thin-adapter; this is the one refactor that touches the live claim gate); D3 runner holds its own injectable rebar.llm.Runner, the seams agent_runner is unused; D4 runner computes the centrality-scaled budget cap unless usd_budget overrides; D5 criterion prompt-id equals the registry id. Open Qs: extraction home (sizing.py vs a new pass1.py), and whether to land the orchestrator refactor as its own behaviour-preserving PR first.
